WITH score_agg AS ( SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY ar.student_id ), eng_agg AS ( SELECT e.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0) AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day) AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY e.student_id ), class_max AS ( SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS mc, MAX(active_days) AS ma FROM eng_agg ), cohort_fe AS ( SELECT sa.student_id, sa.avg_score, COALESCE((ea.total_clicks::float / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5, 0) + COALESCE((ea.active_days::float / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5, 0) AS engagement_score FROM score_agg sa JOIN eng_agg ea ON ea.student_id = sa.student_id CROSS JOIN class_max cm ), model AS ( SELECT REGR_SLOPE(avg_score, engagement_score) AS coef_engagement, REGR_INTERCEPT(avg_score, engagement_score) AS intercept FROM cohort_fe ) SELECT cf.student_id, cf.engagement_score, cf.avg_score, m.coef_engagement, m.intercept, CASE WHEN m.coef_engagement IS NULL OR m.intercept IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE m.intercept + m.coef_engagement * cf.engagement_score END AS predicted_avg_score, CASE WHEN cf.student_id = $2 THEN true ELSE false END AS is_selected_student FROM cohort_fe cf CROSS JOIN model m ORDER BY is_selected_student DESC, cf.engagement_score
LIMIT 10000

WITH
score_context AS (
  SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8 ELSE 100::float8 END AS score_scale,
         CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8 ELSE 40::float8 END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8 ELSE 70::float8 END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  WHERE a.class_id = $1
),
class_assessment AS (
  SELECT ar.assessment_id,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS class_avg_score
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  WHERE a.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.assessment_id
),
student_trend AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)::float8 AS performance_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  WHERE ar.student_id = $2
    AND a.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
)
SELECT a.assessment_order,
       a.week_of_class,
       a.assessment_type,
       a.assessment_name,
       ar.score_normalized,
       (ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold) AS pass_flag,
       ca.class_avg_score,
       ROUND((ar.score_normalized - ca.class_avg_score)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS score_vs_class_avg,
       sc.score_scale,
       sc.pass_threshold,
       sc.target_threshold,
       (ar.score_normalized < sc.pass_threshold) AS below_pass_threshold,
       (ar.score_normalized < sc.target_threshold) AS below_target_threshold,
       st.performance_trend,
       CASE
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < sc.pass_threshold THEN 'urgent_support'
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < sc.target_threshold THEN 'targeted_practice'
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < ca.class_avg_score THEN 'monitor'
         ELSE 'maintain'
       END AS support_level,
       CASE
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < sc.pass_threshold THEN 'Review this assessment with tutor support; focus on missed core concepts before the next assessment.'
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < sc.target_threshold THEN 'Practice similar questions and review feedback to move from pass-level to target-level performance.'
         WHEN ar.score_normalized < ca.class_avg_score THEN 'You are passing but below class average here; review feedback and compare preparation habits.'
         ELSE 'Keep the current preparation pattern and use feedback to protect this level.'
       END AS recommended_action
FROM assessment_result ar
JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
JOIN class_assessment ca ON ca.assessment_id = ar.assessment_id
CROSS JOIN score_context sc
LEFT JOIN student_trend st ON st.student_id = ar.student_id
WHERE ar.student_id = $2
  AND a.class_id = $1
ORDER BY a.assessment_order
LIMIT 10000

SELECT COALESCE(a.competency_tag, a.assessment_name, 'Unknown') AS competency_tag, CASE WHEN a.competency_tag IS NOT NULL THEN 'native' WHEN a.assessment_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'proxy' ELSE 'unknown' END AS competency_source, a.assessment_type, ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric,2)::float8 AS avg_score, ROUND(AVG(ar.pass_flag::int)::numeric,4)::float8 AS pass_rate, COUNT(*) AS assessment_count FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id=a.assessment_id WHERE ar.student_id=$1 AND a.class_id=$2 GROUP BY COALESCE(a.competency_tag, a.assessment_name, 'Unknown'), CASE WHEN a.competency_tag IS NOT NULL THEN 'native' WHEN a.assessment_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'proxy' ELSE 'unknown' END, a.assessment_type ORDER BY avg_score ASC
LIMIT 10000

WITH cohort_scores AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         AVG(ar.score_normalized)                             AS avg_score,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order) AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  WHERE a.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
eng_agg AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         SUM(eng.engagement_count)        AS total_clicks,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)    AS active_days
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY e.student_id
),
class_max AS (
  SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS mc,
         MAX(active_days)  AS ma
  FROM eng_agg
),
cohort_eng AS (
  SELECT ea.student_id,
         (ea.total_clicks / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5
           + (ea.active_days / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5      AS engagement_score
  FROM eng_agg ea, class_max cm
)
SELECT cs.student_id,
       cs.avg_score                                          AS student_avg_score,
       COALESCE(ce.engagement_score, 0)                     AS engagement_score,
       AVG(cs.avg_score)         OVER ()                    AS cohort_avg_score,
       PERCENT_RANK()            OVER (ORDER BY cs.avg_score) AS score_percentile,
       PERCENT_RANK()            OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(ce.engagement_score, 0))

FROM cohort_scores cs
LEFT JOIN cohort_eng ce ON cs.student_id = ce.student_id
WHERE cs.student_id = $2
LIMIT 10000

         sa.assessment_count,
         sa.score_scale,
         sa.pass_threshold,
         sa.target_threshold,
         sa.perf_trend,
         COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) AS engagement_score,
         COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false) AS engagement_score_available,
         COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1)::float8 AS punctuality_rate,
         COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) AS previous_attempt_count,
         e.final_outcome,
         (sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold) AS flag_low_score,
         (COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0) AS flag_repeated,
         (COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false)
           AND COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 1) < 0.15) AS flag_low_engagement,
         (COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7) AS flag_low_punctuality,
         (sa.perf_trend < 0) AS flag_neg_trend,
         ((CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false)
                    AND COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 1) < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS sum_flags
  FROM score_agg sa
  JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id
                   AND e.class_id = $1
  LEFT JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id
  LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id
)
SELECT flag_name,
       flag_value,
       threshold,
       triggered,
       severity,
       flag_description,
       recommended_action,
       support_category
FROM (
  SELECT 'flag_low_score' AS flag_name,
         rf.avg_score AS flag_value,
         rf.pass_threshold AS threshold,
         rf.flag_low_score AS triggered,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_score THEN 'high' ELSE 'info' END AS severity,
         'Average score is below the pass threshold for this dataset scale.' AS flag_description,
         'Review the weakest assessment topics and schedule tutor support before the next assessment.' AS recommended_action,
         'academic_performance' AS support_category,
         1 AS sort_order
  FROM risk_flags rf
  WHERE rf.student_id = $2
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_repeated',
         rf.previous_attempt_count::float8,
         0::float8,
         rf.flag_repeated,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_repeated THEN 'medium' ELSE 'info' END,
         'This student has previous attempts, which can indicate accumulated difficulty or re-enrolment risk.',
         'Check prior attempt context and confirm whether the student needs a catch-up plan.',
         'academic_history',
         2
  FROM risk_flags rf
  WHERE rf.student_id = $2
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_low_engagement',
         rf.engagement_score::float8,
         0.15::float8,
         rf.flag_low_engagement,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_engagement THEN 'medium' ELSE 'info' END,
         CASE WHEN rf.engagement_score_available
              THEN 'Engagement score is below the low-engagement threshold.'
              ELSE 'Engagement data is not available for this dataset, so this flag is not counted.' END,
         CASE WHEN rf.engagement_score_available
              THEN 'Set a weekly study routine and interact with course resources before assessment deadlines.'
              ELSE 'Use assessment trend and score feedback instead of engagement-based recommendations.' END,
         'engagement',
         3
  FROM risk_flags rf
  WHERE rf.student_id = $2
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_low_punctuality',
         rf.punctuality_rate::float8,
         0.7::float8,
         rf.flag_low_punctuality,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_punctuality THEN 'medium' ELSE 'info' END,
         'Submission punctuality is below the expected threshold.',
         'Use deadline reminders and submit drafts earlier to reduce late-submission risk.',
         'time_management',
         4
  FROM risk_flags rf
  WHERE rf.student_id = $2
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_neg_trend',
         COALESCE(rf.perf_trend, 0)::float8,
         0::float8,
         rf.flag_neg_trend,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_neg_trend THEN 'medium' ELSE 'info' END,
         'Scores are trending downward across assessments.',
         'Compare recent feedback with earlier stronger work and intervene before the next assessment.',
         'trend_monitoring',
         5
  FROM risk_flags rf
  WHERE rf.student_id = $2
) flags
ORDER BY sort_order
LIMIT 10000

WITH weekly AS (  SELECT eng.week_number,         SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS weekly_clicks  FROM engagement eng  WHERE eng.enrollment_id = $1  GROUP BY eng.week_number),rolling AS (  SELECT week_number,         weekly_clicks,         AVG(weekly_clicks) OVER (           ORDER BY week_number           ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING         ) AS rolling_3wk_avg  FROM weekly)SELECT week_number,       weekly_clicks,       rolling_3wk_avg,weekly_clicks < rolling_3wk_avg * 0.5            AS weekly_engagement_drop,       MIN(week_number)         FILTER (WHERE weekly_clicks < rolling_3wk_avg * 0.5)         OVER ()                                        AS early_warning_week FROM rolling ORDER BY week_number
LIMIT 10000

WITH weekly AS ( SELECT week_number, SUM(engagement_count) AS weekly_clicks FROM engagement WHERE enrollment_id = $1 GROUP BY week_number ), student_consistency AS ( SELECT COALESCE(STDDEV(weekly_clicks), 0) AS weekly_stddev, AVG(weekly_clicks) AS weekly_avg, SUM(weekly_clicks) AS total_clicks FROM weekly ), class_weekly AS ( SELECT e2.enrollment_id, eng2.week_number, SUM(eng2.engagement_count) AS weekly_clicks FROM enrollment e2 JOIN engagement eng2 ON e2.enrollment_id = eng2.enrollment_id WHERE e2.class_id = $2 GROUP BY e2.enrollment_id, eng2.week_number ), class_student_consistency AS ( SELECT enrollment_id, COALESCE(STDDEV(weekly_clicks), 0) AS weekly_stddev FROM class_weekly GROUP BY enrollment_id ), class_thresholds AS ( SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.33) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY weekly_stddev) AS p33, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.66) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY weekly_stddev) AS p66 FROM class_student_consistency ) SELECT w.week_number, w.weekly_clicks, sc.weekly_stddev, sc.weekly_avg, sc.total_clicks, CASE WHEN sc.weekly_stddev <= COALESCE(ct.p33, sc.weekly_stddev) THEN 'high' WHEN sc.weekly_stddev <= COALESCE(ct.p66, sc.weekly_stddev) THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS consistency_level FROM weekly w CROSS JOIN student_consistency sc CROSS JOIN class_thresholds ct ORDER BY w.week_number
LIMIT 10000

SELECT e.absences,       ROUND(e.absences::float / NULLIF(         (SELECT MAX(e2.absences)          FROM enrollment e2          WHERE e2.class_id = $1            AND e2.source_dataset = 'UCI'), 0), 4) AS absence_rate FROM enrollment e WHERE e.student_id = $2 AND e.class_id = $1
LIMIT 10000

SELECT a.assessment_order, a.week_of_class, ar.score_normalized, ar.pass_flag FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id WHERE ar.student_id = $1 AND a.class_id = $2 ORDER BY a.assessment_order
LIMIT 10000

SELECT a.assessment_order,       a.assessment_type,       a.assessment_name,       (ar.submission_day - a.due_day)                          AS submission_delay_days,       ar.score_normalized,       ar.pass_flag,       ar.submission_day,       a.due_day,       AVG(ar.submission_day - a.due_day)         FILTER (WHERE (ar.submission_day - a.due_day) > 0)         OVER ()                                                 AS submission_delay_avg,       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day)OVER () * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) OVER (), 0)            AS punctuality_rate FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id WHERE ar.student_id = $1 AND a.class_id = $2 ORDER BY a.assessment_order
LIMIT 10000

SELECT s.alcohol_weekday,
       s.alcohol_weekend,
       s.go_out_freq,
       s.health_status,
       s.family_relation,
       s.free_time,
       s.lifestyle_risk_score,
       ROUND(
         (SELECT AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric
          FROM assessment_result ar
          JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
          WHERE ar.student_id = $1
            AND a.class_id   = $2
         ), 2
       )::float8 AS avg_score
FROM student s
WHERE s.student_id = $1
LIMIT 10000

WITH resource_clicks AS (SELECT ev.resource_type, SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS clicks FROM engagement eng JOIN event ev ON eng.event_id=ev.event_id WHERE eng.enrollment_id=$1 GROUP BY ev.resource_type),totals AS (SELECT SUM(clicks) AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT resource_type) AS distinct_types FROM resource_clicks),class_distinct AS (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ev2.resource_type) AS class_total_types FROM event ev2 WHERE ev2.class_id=$2)SELECT rc.resource_type, rc.clicks, rc.clicks*1.0/NULLIF(t.total_clicks,0) AS pct_of_total,  t.distinct_types*1.0/NULLIF(cd.class_total_types,0) AS vle_diversity_score,  SUM(CASE WHEN rc.resource_type='forumng' THEN rc.clicks ELSE 0 END) OVER()*1.0/NULLIF(t.total_clicks,0) AS forum_engagement_rate FROM resource_clicks rc, totals t, class_distinct cd ORDER BY rc.clicks DESC
LIMIT 10000

SELECT e.registration_lead_time,
       ROUND(
         (SELECT AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric
          FROM assessment_result ar
          JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
          WHERE ar.student_id = $1
            AND a.class_id   = $2
         ), 2
       )::float8 AS avg_score
FROM enrollment e
WHERE e.student_id = $1
  AND e.class_id   = $2
LIMIT 10000

SELECT a.assessment_order, a.assessment_name, a.due_day, ar.submission_day, (ar.submission_day - a.due_day) AS submission_delay_days, ar.score_normalized, ar.pass_flag FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id WHERE ar.student_id = $1 AND a.class_id = $2 ORDER BY a.assessment_order
LIMIT 10000

SELECT AVG(ar.submission_day - a.due_day) FILTER (WHERE (ar.submission_day - a.due_day) > 0) AS submission_delay_avg, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS punctuality_rate FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id WHERE ar.student_id = $1 AND a.class_id = $2
LIMIT 10000

WITH
score_context AS (
  SELECT CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8
           ELSE 100::float8
         END AS score_scale,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8
           ELSE 40::float8
         END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8
           ELSE 70::float8
         END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
),
score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         ROUND((
           CASE
             WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                    WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                      AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                  ) > 0
               THEN SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
             ELSE AVG(ar.score_normalized)
           END
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS unweighted_avg_score,
         ROUND((
           SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ), 0)
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS weighted_avg_score,
         CASE
           WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN 'weighted_by_assessment_weight'
           ELSE 'unweighted_average_fallback'
         END AS score_strategy,
         ROUND(AVG((ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold)::int)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS pass_rate,
         COUNT(*)::int AS assessment_count,
         sc.score_scale,
         sc.pass_threshold,
         sc.target_threshold,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)::float8 AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  CROSS JOIN score_context sc
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id, sc.score_scale, sc.pass_threshold, sc.target_threshold
),
punctuality AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         CASE
           WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0
                  / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
           ELSE 1.0
         END AS punctuality_rate
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
eng_agg AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days,
         (COUNT(eng.engagement_id) > 0) AS has_engagement_data
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY e.student_id
),
class_max AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_clicks), 0) AS mc,
         NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0) AS ma
  FROM eng_agg
),
eng_score AS (
  SELECT ea.student_id,
         ea.has_engagement_data,
         CASE
           WHEN ea.has_engagement_data
             THEN COALESCE(ea.total_clicks / cm.mc, 0) * 0.5
                  + COALESCE(ea.active_days / cm.ma, 0) * 0.5
           ELSE NULL
         END AS engagement_score
  FROM eng_agg ea
  CROSS JOIN class_max cm
),
risk_flags AS (
  SELECT sa.student_id,
         e.enrollment_id,
         sa.avg_score,
         sa.unweighted_avg_score,
         sa.weighted_avg_score,
         sa.score_strategy,
         sa.pass_rate,
         sa.assessment_count,
         sa.score_scale,
         sa.pass_threshold,
         sa.target_threshold,
         sa.perf_trend,
         COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) AS engagement_score,
         COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false) AS engagement_score_available,
         COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1)::float8 AS punctuality_rate,
         COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) AS previous_attempt_count,
         e.final_outcome,
         (sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold) AS flag_low_score,
         (COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0) AS flag_repeated,
         (COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false)
           AND COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 1) < 0.15) AS flag_low_engagement,
         (COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7) AS flag_low_punctuality,
         (sa.perf_trend < 0) AS flag_neg_trend,
         ((CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false)
                    AND COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 1) < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS sum_flags
  FROM score_agg sa
  JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id
                   AND e.class_id = $1
  LEFT JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id
  LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id
),
absence_calc AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         e.class_id,
         e.absences,
         ROUND((
           e.absences::float8 / NULLIF(MAX(e.absences) OVER (PARTITION BY e.class_id), 0)
         )::numeric, 4)::float8 AS absence_rate
  FROM enrollment e
  WHERE e.student_id = $2
    AND e.class_id = $1
)
SELECT rf.avg_score,
       rf.perf_trend AS performance_trend,
       rf.engagement_score,
       rf.engagement_score_available,
       ac.absence_rate,
       s.lifestyle_risk_score,
       rf.score_strategy,
       rf.score_scale,
       rf.pass_threshold,
       rf.target_threshold,
       rf.sum_flags AS at_risk_score,
       CASE WHEN rf.sum_flags >= 3 THEN 'high' WHEN rf.sum_flags = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label
FROM risk_flags rf
LEFT JOIN absence_calc ac ON ac.student_id = rf.student_id
JOIN student s ON s.student_id = rf.student_id
WHERE rf.student_id = $2
LIMIT 10000

SELECT s.social_balance_score,
       s.free_time,
       s.go_out_freq,
       s.alcohol_weekday,
       ROUND(
         (SELECT AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric
          FROM assessment_result ar
          JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
          WHERE ar.student_id = $1
            AND a.class_id   = $2
         ), 2
       )::float8 AS avg_score
FROM student s
WHERE s.student_id = $1
LIMIT 10000

SELECT s.family_stability_score,
       s.family_relation,
       s.parent_cohabitation_status,
       s.mother_education_level, s.father_education_level,
       ROUND(
         (SELECT AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric
          FROM assessment_result ar
          JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
          WHERE ar.student_id = $1
            AND a.class_id   = $2
         ), 2
       )::float8 AS avg_score
FROM student s
WHERE s.student_id = $1
LIMIT 10000

WITH
score_context AS (
  SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8 ELSE 100::float8 END AS score_scale,
         CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8 ELSE 40::float8 END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8 ELSE 70::float8 END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
),
assessment_plan AS (
  SELECT a.assessment_id,
         a.assessment_order,
         a.weight_pct::float8 AS weight_pct
  FROM assessment a
  WHERE a.class_id = $1
),
student_progress AS (
  SELECT ap.assessment_id,
         ap.assessment_order,
         ap.weight_pct,
         ar.score_normalized::float8 AS score_normalized
  FROM assessment_plan ap
  LEFT JOIN assessment_result ar
    ON ar.assessment_id = ap.assessment_id
   AND ar.student_id = $2
),
aggregate_metrics AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_assessments,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sp.score_normalized IS NOT NULL)::int AS completed_assessments,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sp.score_normalized IS NULL)::int AS remaining_assessments,
         COALESCE(SUM(sp.score_normalized), 0)::float8 AS sum_completed_scores,
         COALESCE(SUM(sp.score_normalized * sp.weight_pct) FILTER (WHERE sp.weight_pct IS NOT NULL), 0)::float8 AS weighted_points_completed,
         COALESCE(SUM(sp.weight_pct) FILTER (WHERE sp.weight_pct IS NOT NULL), 0)::float8 AS total_weight_pct,
         COALESCE(SUM(sp.weight_pct) FILTER (WHERE sp.weight_pct IS NOT NULL AND sp.score_normalized IS NOT NULL), 0)::float8 AS completed_weight_pct,
         COALESCE(SUM(sp.weight_pct) FILTER (WHERE sp.weight_pct IS NOT NULL AND sp.score_normalized IS NULL), 0)::float8 AS remaining_weight_pct
  FROM student_progress sp
),
goal_calc AS (
  SELECT sc.score_scale,
         sc.pass_threshold,
         sc.target_threshold,
         am.total_assessments,
         am.completed_assessments,
         am.remaining_assessments,
         am.total_weight_pct,
         am.completed_weight_pct,
         am.remaining_weight_pct,
         CASE
           WHEN am.total_weight_pct > 0 THEN 'weighted_by_assessment_weight'
           ELSE 'unweighted_average_fallback'
         END AS calculation_mode,
         CASE
           WHEN am.total_weight_pct > 0 AND am.completed_weight_pct > 0
             THEN am.weighted_points_completed / NULLIF(am.completed_weight_pct, 0)
           WHEN am.completed_assessments > 0
             THEN am.sum_completed_scores / NULLIF(am.completed_assessments, 0)
           ELSE NULL
         END AS current_score_raw,
         CASE
           WHEN am.total_weight_pct > 0 AND am.remaining_weight_pct > 0
             THEN (sc.pass_threshold * am.total_weight_pct - am.weighted_points_completed) / NULLIF(am.remaining_weight_pct, 0)
           WHEN am.total_weight_pct = 0 AND am.remaining_assessments > 0
             THEN (sc.pass_threshold * am.total_assessments - am.sum_completed_scores) / NULLIF(am.remaining_assessments, 0)
           ELSE NULL
         END AS required_pass_raw,
         CASE
           WHEN am.total_weight_pct > 0 AND am.remaining_weight_pct > 0
             THEN (sc.target_threshold * am.total_weight_pct - am.weighted_points_completed) / NULLIF(am.remaining_weight_pct, 0)
           WHEN am.total_weight_pct = 0 AND am.remaining_assessments > 0
             THEN (sc.target_threshold * am.total_assessments - am.sum_completed_scores) / NULLIF(am.remaining_assessments, 0)
           ELSE NULL
         END AS required_target_raw
  FROM score_context sc
  CROSS JOIN aggregate_metrics am
)
SELECT ROUND(gc.current_score_raw::numeric, 2)::float8 AS current_score,
       ROUND(gc.score_scale::numeric, 2)::float8 AS score_scale,
       ROUND(gc.pass_threshold::numeric, 2)::float8 AS pass_threshold,
       ROUND(gc.target_threshold::numeric, 2)::float8 AS target_threshold,
       gc.completed_assessments,
       gc.remaining_assessments,
       ROUND(gc.completed_weight_pct::numeric, 2)::float8 AS completed_weight_pct,
       ROUND(gc.remaining_weight_pct::numeric, 2)::float8 AS remaining_weight_pct,
       gc.calculation_mode,
       ROUND(CASE
         WHEN gc.remaining_assessments = 0 THEN CASE WHEN gc.current_score_raw >= gc.pass_threshold THEN 0 ELSE NULL END
         ELSE GREATEST(gc.required_pass_raw, 0)
       END::numeric, 2)::float8 AS needed_score_for_pass,
       ROUND(CASE
         WHEN gc.remaining_assessments = 0 THEN CASE WHEN gc.current_score_raw >= gc.target_threshold THEN 0 ELSE NULL END
         ELSE GREATEST(gc.required_target_raw, 0)
       END::numeric, 2)::float8 AS needed_score_for_target,
       CASE
         WHEN gc.remaining_assessments = 0 AND gc.current_score_raw >= gc.pass_threshold THEN 'already_achieved'
         WHEN gc.remaining_assessments = 0 AND gc.current_score_raw < gc.pass_threshold THEN 'no_remaining_below_threshold'
         WHEN gc.required_pass_raw <= 0 THEN 'already_achieved'
         WHEN gc.required_pass_raw <= gc.score_scale THEN 'achievable'
         ELSE 'unreachable'
       END AS pass_goal_status,
       CASE
         WHEN gc.remaining_assessments = 0 AND gc.current_score_raw >= gc.target_threshold THEN 'already_achieved'
         WHEN gc.remaining_assessments = 0 AND gc.current_score_raw < gc.target_threshold THEN 'no_remaining_below_threshold'
         WHEN gc.required_target_raw <= 0 THEN 'already_achieved'
         WHEN gc.required_target_raw <= gc.score_scale THEN 'achievable'
         ELSE 'unreachable'
       END AS target_goal_status
FROM goal_calc gc
LIMIT 10000

SELECT a.assessment_order,
       a.assessment_name,
       a.assessment_type,
       a.week_of_class,
       a.due_day,
       ar.submission_day,
       ar.score_normalized,
       CASE WHEN ar.assessment_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'submitted' ELSE 'pending' END AS submission_status,
       CASE WHEN ar.assessment_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS submitted_flag
FROM assessment a
LEFT JOIN assessment_result ar
  ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
 AND ar.student_id = $1
WHERE a.class_id = $2
ORDER BY a.assessment_order ASC, a.assessment_name ASC
LIMIT 10000

WITH per_student AS (SELECT e.student_id, ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN assessment_result ar ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY e.student_id), bucketed AS (SELECT CASE WHEN avg_score IS NULL THEN 'No score' WHEN avg_score < 10 THEN '0-10' WHEN avg_score < 20 THEN '10-20' WHEN avg_score < 30 THEN '20-30' WHEN avg_score < 40 THEN '30-40' WHEN avg_score < 50 THEN '40-50' WHEN avg_score < 60 THEN '50-60' WHEN avg_score < 70 THEN '60-70' WHEN avg_score < 80 THEN '70-80' WHEN avg_score < 90 THEN '80-90' ELSE '90-100' END AS score_bucket, CASE WHEN avg_score IS NULL THEN 11 WHEN avg_score < 10 THEN 1 WHEN avg_score < 20 THEN 2 WHEN avg_score < 30 THEN 3 WHEN avg_score < 40 THEN 4 WHEN avg_score < 50 THEN 5 WHEN avg_score < 60 THEN 6 WHEN avg_score < 70 THEN 7 WHEN avg_score < 80 THEN 8 WHEN avg_score < 90 THEN 9 ELSE 10 END AS bucket_order, avg_score FROM per_student) SELECT score_bucket, COUNT(*)::int AS student_count, ROUND((COUNT(*) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 0))::numeric, 1)::float8 AS pct_of_class, ROUND(AVG(avg_score)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score_in_bucket FROM bucketed GROUP BY score_bucket, bucket_order ORDER BY bucket_order
LIMIT 10000

SELECT final_outcome, COUNT(*) AS student_count, ROUND(COUNT(*)*100.0/SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(),1) AS pct_of_class FROM enrollment WHERE class_id=$1 GROUP BY final_outcome ORDER BY student_count DESC
LIMIT 10000

WITH eng_agg AS (SELECT e.student_id, e.enrollment_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND e.source_dataset = 'OULAD' GROUP BY e.student_id, e.enrollment_id), class_stats AS (SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS max_clicks, MAX(active_days) AS max_active FROM eng_agg), scored AS (SELECT ea.student_id, ea.total_clicks, ea.active_days, COALESCE((ea.total_clicks / NULLIF(cs.max_clicks, 0)) * 0.5, 0) + COALESCE((ea.active_days / NULLIF(cs.max_active, 0)) * 0.5, 0) AS engagement_score FROM eng_agg ea CROSS JOIN class_stats cs), ranked AS (SELECT *, CASE NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY engagement_score ASC, total_clicks ASC) WHEN 1 THEN 'very_low' WHEN 2 THEN 'low' WHEN 3 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'high' END AS study_effort_level FROM scored) SELECT study_effort_level, COUNT(*)::int AS student_count, ROUND((COUNT(*) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 0))::numeric, 1)::float8 AS pct_of_class, ROUND(AVG(engagement_score)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS avg_engagement_score FROM ranked GROUP BY study_effort_level ORDER BY CASE study_effort_level WHEN 'very_low' THEN 1 WHEN 'low' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END
LIMIT 10000

WITH
score_context AS (
  SELECT CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8
           ELSE 100::float8
         END AS score_scale,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8
           ELSE 40::float8
         END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8
           ELSE 70::float8
         END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
),
score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         ROUND((
           CASE
             WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                    WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                      AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                  ) > 0
               THEN SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
             ELSE AVG(ar.score_normalized)
           END
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS unweighted_avg_score,
         ROUND((
           SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ), 0)
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS weighted_avg_score,
         CASE
           WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN 'weighted_by_assessment_weight'
           ELSE 'unweighted_average_fallback'
         END AS score_strategy,
         ROUND(AVG((ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold)::int)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS pass_rate,
         COUNT(*)::int AS assessment_count,
         sc.score_scale,
         sc.pass_threshold,
         sc.target_threshold,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)::float8 AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  CROSS JOIN score_context sc
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id, sc.score_scale, sc.pass_threshold, sc.target_threshold
),
punctuality AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         CASE
           WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0
                  / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
           ELSE 1.0
         END AS punctuality_rate
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
eng_agg AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days,
         (COUNT(eng.engagement_id) > 0) AS has_engagement_data
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY e.student_id
),
class_max AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_clicks), 0) AS mc,
         NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0) AS ma
  FROM eng_agg
),
eng_score AS (
  SELECT ea.student_id,
         ea.has_engagement_data,
         CASE
           WHEN ea.has_engagement_data
             THEN COALESCE(ea.total_clicks / cm.mc, 0) * 0.5
                  + COALESCE(ea.active_days / cm.ma, 0) * 0.5
           ELSE NULL
         END AS engagement_score
  FROM eng_agg ea
  CROSS JOIN class_max cm
),
risk_flags AS (
  SELECT sa.student_id,
         e.enrollment_id,
         sa.avg_score,
         sa.unweighted_avg_score,
         sa.weighted_avg_score,
         sa.score_strategy,
         sa.pass_rate,
         sa.assessment_count,
         sa.score_scale,
         sa.pass_threshold,
         sa.target_threshold,
         sa.perf_trend,
         COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) AS engagement_score,
         COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false) AS engagement_score_available,
         COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1)::float8 AS punctuality_rate,
         COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) AS previous_attempt_count,
         e.final_outcome,
         (sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold) AS flag_low_score,
         (COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0) AS flag_repeated,
         (COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false)
           AND COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 1) < 0.15) AS flag_low_engagement,
         (COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7) AS flag_low_punctuality,
         (sa.perf_trend < 0) AS flag_neg_trend,
         ((CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false)
                    AND COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 1) < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS sum_flags
  FROM score_agg sa
  JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id
                   AND e.class_id = $1
  LEFT JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id
  LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id
)
SELECT CASE WHEN rf.sum_flags >= 3 THEN 'high' WHEN rf.sum_flags = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label,
       COUNT(*)::int AS student_count
FROM risk_flags rf
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY MIN(CASE WHEN rf.sum_flags >= 3 THEN 1 WHEN rf.sum_flags = 2 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END)
LIMIT 10000

WITH score_agg AS (SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score, REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order) AS perf_trend FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY ar.student_id), eng_agg AS (SELECT e.student_id, SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day) AS active_days FROM enrollment e JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY e.student_id), class_max AS (SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS mc, MAX(active_days) AS ma FROM eng_agg), eng_score AS (SELECT ea.student_id, (ea.total_clicks / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5 + (ea.active_days / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5 AS engagement_score, CASE WHEN NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY ea.total_clicks) = 1 THEN 'very_low' WHEN NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY ea.total_clicks) = 2 THEN 'low' WHEN NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY ea.total_clicks) = 3 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'high' END AS study_effort_level FROM eng_agg ea, class_max cm), punctuality AS (SELECT ar.student_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS punctuality_rate FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND e.source_dataset = 'OULAD' GROUP BY ar.student_id), risk_flags AS (SELECT sa.student_id, (CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN e.previous_attempt_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN es.engagement_score < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS at_risk_score FROM score_agg sa JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id AND e.class_id = $1 LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id) SELECT s.student_id, s.gender, s.age_group, s.region, e.previous_attempt_count, e.final_outcome, sa.avg_score, rf.at_risk_score, CASE WHEN rf.at_risk_score >= 3 THEN 'high' WHEN rf.at_risk_score = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label, es.engagement_score, es.study_effort_level FROM student s JOIN enrollment e ON s.student_id = e.student_id AND e.class_id = $1 JOIN score_agg sa ON sa.student_id = s.student_id JOIN risk_flags rf ON rf.student_id = s.student_id JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = s.student_id WHERE s.student_id = $2
LIMIT 10000

SELECT a.assessment_order, a.week_of_class, a.assessment_type, a.assessment_name, ar.score_normalized, ar.pass_flag FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id=a.assessment_id WHERE ar.student_id=$1 AND a.class_id=$2 ORDER BY a.assessment_order
LIMIT 10000

WITH weekly AS ( SELECT week_number, SUM(engagement_count) AS weekly_clicks FROM engagement WHERE enrollment_id = $1 GROUP BY week_number ), weekly_enriched AS ( SELECT week_number, weekly_clicks, AVG(weekly_clicks) OVER (ORDER BY week_number ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS rolling_3wk_avg, weekly_clicks - LAG(weekly_clicks) OVER (ORDER BY week_number) AS weekly_engagement_drop FROM weekly ), student_consistency AS ( SELECT COALESCE(STDDEV(weekly_clicks), 0) AS weekly_stddev FROM weekly ), class_weekly AS ( SELECT e2.enrollment_id, eng2.week_number, SUM(eng2.engagement_count) AS weekly_clicks FROM enrollment e2 JOIN engagement eng2 ON e2.enrollment_id = eng2.enrollment_id WHERE e2.class_id = $2 GROUP BY e2.enrollment_id, eng2.week_number ), class_student_consistency AS ( SELECT enrollment_id, COALESCE(STDDEV(weekly_clicks), 0) AS weekly_stddev FROM class_weekly GROUP BY enrollment_id ), class_thresholds AS ( SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.33) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY weekly_stddev) AS p33, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.66) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY weekly_stddev) AS p66 FROM class_student_consistency ), classified AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN sc.weekly_stddev <= COALESCE(ct.p33, sc.weekly_stddev) THEN 'high' WHEN sc.weekly_stddev <= COALESCE(ct.p66, sc.weekly_stddev) THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS consistency_level FROM student_consistency sc CROSS JOIN class_thresholds ct ), warning AS ( SELECT MIN(week_number) AS early_warning_week FROM weekly_enriched WHERE rolling_3wk_avg IS NOT NULL AND weekly_clicks < rolling_3wk_avg * 0.5 ) SELECT we.week_number, we.weekly_clicks, we.rolling_3wk_avg, we.weekly_engagement_drop, w.early_warning_week, c.consistency_level FROM weekly_enriched we CROSS JOIN warning w CROSS JOIN classified c ORDER BY we.week_number
LIMIT 10000

WITH
score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         AVG(ar.score_normalized)                             AS avg_score,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order) AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment  a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment  e ON ar.student_id    = e.student_id
                    AND a.class_id       = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
punctuality AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0
           / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)                              AS punctuality_rate
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id   = e.student_id
                   AND a.class_id      = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
)
SELECT flag_name, flag_value, threshold, triggered
FROM (
  SELECT 'flag_low_score'        AS flag_name,
         sa.avg_score            AS flag_value,
         40                      AS threshold,
         (sa.avg_score < 40)     AS triggered
  FROM score_agg sa
  WHERE sa.student_id = $2
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_high_absence'     AS flag_name,
         e.absences::float       AS flag_value,
         10                      AS threshold,
         (e.absences > 10)       AS triggered
  FROM enrollment e
  WHERE e.student_id = $2 AND e.class_id = $1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_low_punctuality'  AS flag_name,
         p.punctuality_rate      AS flag_value,
         0.7                     AS threshold,
         (p.punctuality_rate < 0.7) AS triggered
  FROM punctuality p
  WHERE p.student_id = $2
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'flag_neg_trend'        AS flag_name,
         COALESCE(sa.perf_trend, 0) AS flag_value,
         0                       AS threshold,
         (sa.perf_trend < 0)     AS triggered
  FROM score_agg sa
  WHERE sa.student_id = $2
) flags
LIMIT 10000

SELECT COALESCE(a.competency_tag, a.assessment_name, 'Unknown') AS competency_tag, CASE WHEN a.competency_tag IS NOT NULL THEN 'native' WHEN a.assessment_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'proxy' ELSE 'unknown' END AS competency_source, a.assessment_type, ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric,2)::float8 AS avg_score, ROUND(AVG(ar.pass_flag::int)::numeric,4)::float8 AS pass_rate, COUNT(*) AS assessment_count FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id=a.assessment_id WHERE ar.student_id=$1 AND a.class_id=$2 GROUP BY COALESCE(a.competency_tag, a.assessment_name, 'Unknown'), CASE WHEN a.competency_tag IS NOT NULL THEN 'native' WHEN a.assessment_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'proxy' ELSE 'unknown' END, a.assessment_type ORDER BY avg_score ASC
LIMIT 10000

SELECT a.assessment_order, a.assessment_name, a.due_day,       ar.submission_day,       (ar.submission_day - a.due_day)                              AS submission_delay_days,       ar.score_normalized, ar.pass_flag,       AVG(ar.submission_day - a.due_day)         FILTER (WHERE (ar.submission_day - a.due_day) > 0)         OVER ()                                                     AS submission_delay_avg,       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day)         OVER () * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) OVER (), 0)               AS punctuality_rate FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id WHERE ar.student_id = $1 AND a.class_id = $2 ORDER BY a.assessment_order
LIMIT 10000

SELECT s.highest_education,
       s.school,
       s.family_size,
       s.gender,
       s.age_years,
       s.age_group,
       s.school_support_flag,
       s.family_support_flag,
       s.has_paid_class,
       s.internet_access_flag,
       s.support_score,
       s.lifestyle_risk_score,
       s.social_balance_score,
       s.family_stability_score,
       e.previous_attempt_count,
       e.studytime,
       e.absences
FROM student s
JOIN enrollment e ON s.student_id = e.student_id
WHERE s.student_id = $1
  AND e.class_id   = $2
  AND s.source_dataset = 'UCI'
LIMIT 10000

WITH score_agg AS ( SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score, REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order) AS perf_trend FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND ar.student_id = $2 GROUP BY ar.student_id ), eng_agg AS ( SELECT e.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0) AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day) AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND e.student_id = $2 GROUP BY e.student_id ), class_eng_agg AS ( SELECT e2.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0) AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day) AS active_days FROM enrollment e2 LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e2.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e2.class_id = $1 GROUP BY e2.student_id ), class_max AS ( SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS mc, MAX(active_days) AS ma FROM class_eng_agg ), eng_score AS ( SELECT ea.student_id, COALESCE((ea.total_clicks::float / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5, 0) + COALESCE((ea.active_days::float / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5, 0) AS engagement_score FROM eng_agg ea CROSS JOIN class_max cm ), punctuality AS ( SELECT ar.student_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS punctuality_rate FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND ar.student_id = $2 AND e.source_dataset = 'OULAD' GROUP BY ar.student_id ), risk_flags AS ( SELECT sa.student_id, (CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN e.previous_attempt_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN es.engagement_score < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS at_risk_score FROM score_agg sa JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id AND e.class_id = $1 LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id ), weekly_eng AS ( SELECT week_number, SUM(engagement_count) AS weekly_clicks, AVG(SUM(engagement_count)) OVER (ORDER BY week_number ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS rolling_3wk_avg FROM engagement WHERE enrollment_id = $3 GROUP BY week_number ) SELECT sa.avg_score, sa.perf_trend AS performance_trend, es.engagement_score, COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1.0) AS punctuality_rate, (SELECT MIN(week_number) FROM weekly_eng WHERE rolling_3wk_avg IS NOT NULL AND weekly_clicks < rolling_3wk_avg * 0.5) AS early_warning_week, s.support_score, rf.at_risk_score, CASE WHEN rf.at_risk_score >= 3 THEN 'high' WHEN rf.at_risk_score = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label, e.final_outcome FROM score_agg sa JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id JOIN risk_flags rf ON rf.student_id = sa.student_id JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = $2 AND e.class_id = $1 JOIN student s ON s.student_id = $2 WHERE sa.student_id = $2
LIMIT 10000

SELECT ar.student_id, a.assessment_order, a.week_of_class, a.assessment_type, ar.score_normalized FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment  a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment  e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id                  AND e.class_id    = $1 WHERE e.class_id = $1  AND ar.student_id IN ($2, $3) ORDER BY ar.student_id, a.assessment_order
LIMIT 10000

WITH selected_students AS ( SELECT e.student_id, e.enrollment_id, v.student_order FROM (VALUES ($1, 1), ($2, 2)) AS v(student_id, student_order) JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = v.student_id AND e.class_id = $3 ), student_engagement AS ( SELECT ss.student_id, ss.student_order, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days FROM selected_students ss LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON eng.enrollment_id = ss.enrollment_id GROUP BY ss.student_id, ss.student_order ), class_engagement AS ( SELECT e.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $3 GROUP BY e.student_id ), class_max AS ( SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_clicks), 0) AS max_clicks, NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0) AS max_active FROM class_engagement ), scored AS ( SELECT se.student_id, se.student_order, se.total_clicks, se.active_days, COALESCE(se.total_clicks / cm.max_clicks, 0)::float8 AS total_clicks_norm, COALESCE(se.active_days / cm.max_active, 0)::float8 AS active_days_norm, (COALESCE(se.total_clicks / cm.max_clicks, 0) * 0.5 + COALESCE(se.active_days / cm.max_active, 0) * 0.5)::float8 AS engagement_score FROM student_engagement se CROSS JOIN class_max cm ) SELECT student_id, 'total_clicks_norm' AS metric, total_clicks_norm AS engagement_score, total_clicks, active_days, CASE WHEN engagement_score < 0.25 THEN 'very_low' WHEN engagement_score < 0.50 THEN 'low' WHEN engagement_score < 0.75 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'high' END AS study_effort_level FROM scored UNION ALL SELECT student_id, 'active_days_norm' AS metric, active_days_norm AS engagement_score, total_clicks, active_days, CASE WHEN engagement_score < 0.25 THEN 'very_low' WHEN engagement_score < 0.50 THEN 'low' WHEN engagement_score < 0.75 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'high' END AS study_effort_level FROM scored UNION ALL SELECT student_id, 'engagement_score' AS metric, engagement_score AS engagement_score, total_clicks, active_days, CASE WHEN engagement_score < 0.25 THEN 'very_low' WHEN engagement_score < 0.50 THEN 'low' WHEN engagement_score < 0.75 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'high' END AS study_effort_level FROM scored ORDER BY student_id, metric
LIMIT 10000

WITH selected_students AS ( SELECT e.student_id, e.enrollment_id, e.previous_attempt_count, e.final_outcome, v.student_order FROM (VALUES ($1, 1), ($2, 2)) AS v(student_id, student_order) JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = v.student_id AND e.class_id = $3 ), score_agg AS ( SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score, REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order) AS perf_trend FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN selected_students ss ON ar.student_id = ss.student_id AND a.class_id = $3 GROUP BY ar.student_id ), student_engagement AS ( SELECT ss.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days FROM selected_students ss LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON ss.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id GROUP BY ss.student_id ), class_engagement AS ( SELECT e.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $3 GROUP BY e.student_id ), class_max AS ( SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_clicks), 0) AS mc, NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0) AS ma FROM class_engagement ), eng_score AS ( SELECT se.student_id, (COALESCE(se.total_clicks / cm.mc, 0) * 0.5 + COALESCE(se.active_days / cm.ma, 0) * 0.5)::float8 AS engagement_score FROM student_engagement se CROSS JOIN class_max cm ), punctuality AS ( SELECT ar.student_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS punctuality_rate FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN selected_students ss ON ar.student_id = ss.student_id AND a.class_id = $3 GROUP BY ar.student_id ), risk_flags AS ( SELECT ss.student_id, ss.student_order, ss.enrollment_id, sa.avg_score, sa.perf_trend AS performance_trend, COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0)::float8 AS engagement_score, COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1.0)::float8 AS punctuality_rate, COALESCE(ss.previous_attempt_count, 0) AS previous_attempt_count, ss.final_outcome, CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_low_score, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ss.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_repeated, CASE WHEN COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_low_engagement, CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_low_punctuality, CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_neg_trend FROM selected_students ss LEFT JOIN score_agg sa ON sa.student_id = ss.student_id LEFT JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = ss.student_id LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = ss.student_id ) SELECT rf.student_id, rf.avg_score, rf.performance_trend, rf.punctuality_rate, rf.engagement_score, rf.previous_attempt_count, rf.flag_low_score, rf.flag_repeated, rf.flag_low_engagement, rf.flag_low_punctuality, rf.flag_neg_trend, (rf.flag_low_score + rf.flag_repeated + rf.flag_low_engagement + rf.flag_low_punctuality + rf.flag_neg_trend) AS at_risk_score, CASE WHEN (rf.flag_low_score + rf.flag_repeated + rf.flag_low_engagement + rf.flag_low_punctuality + rf.flag_neg_trend) >= 3 THEN 'high' WHEN (rf.flag_low_score + rf.flag_repeated + rf.flag_low_engagement + rf.flag_low_punctuality + rf.flag_neg_trend) = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label, rf.final_outcome FROM risk_flags rf ORDER BY rf.student_order
LIMIT 10000

WITH selected_students AS ( SELECT s.student_id, s.alcohol_weekday, s.alcohol_weekend, s.go_out_freq, s.health_status, s.free_time, s.lifestyle_risk_score AS composite_lifestyle_risk_score, s.social_balance_score, v.student_order FROM (VALUES ($1, 1), ($2, 2)) AS v(student_id, student_order) JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = v.student_id AND e.class_id = $3 JOIN student s ON s.student_id = e.student_id ) SELECT ss.student_id, dim.lifestyle_dimension, dim.lifestyle_risk_score, ss.alcohol_weekday, ss.alcohol_weekend, ss.go_out_freq, ss.health_status, ss.free_time, ss.composite_lifestyle_risk_score, ss.social_balance_score FROM selected_students ss CROSS JOIN LATERAL ( VALUES ('weekday_alcohol', ss.alcohol_weekday::float8, 1), ('weekend_alcohol', ss.alcohol_weekend::float8, 2), ('go_out_frequency', ss.go_out_freq::float8, 3), ('health_status', ss.health_status::float8, 4), ('free_time', ss.free_time::float8, 5) ) AS dim(lifestyle_dimension, lifestyle_risk_score, metric_order) ORDER BY ss.student_order, dim.metric_order
LIMIT 10000

SELECT e.student_id, s.highest_education, e.previous_attempt_count, s.imd_score_numeric, s.socioeconomic_band, s.disability_flag,  s.disadvantage_score, s.support_score, s.family_stability_score FROM enrollment e JOIN student s ON e.student_id=s.student_id WHERE e.class_id=$1 AND e.student_id IN ($2,$3) ORDER BY e.student_id
LIMIT 10000

WITH total_clicks AS ( SELECT e.student_id, SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS total FROM enrollment e JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND e.student_id IN ($2, $3) GROUP BY e.student_id ), resource_usage AS ( SELECT e.student_id, ev.resource_type, SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS clicks FROM enrollment e JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id JOIN event ev ON eng.event_id = ev.event_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND e.student_id IN ($2, $3) GROUP BY e.student_id, ev.resource_type ), student_diversity AS ( SELECT student_id, COUNT(DISTINCT resource_type) AS used_resource_types FROM resource_usage GROUP BY student_id ), class_diversity AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT resource_type) AS total_resource_types FROM event WHERE class_id = $1 ) SELECT ru.student_id, ru.resource_type, ru.clicks, ru.clicks * 1.0 / NULLIF(tc.total, 0) AS pct_of_total, sd.used_resource_types * 1.0 / NULLIF(cd.total_resource_types, 0) AS vle_diversity_score FROM resource_usage ru JOIN total_clicks tc ON ru.student_id = tc.student_id JOIN student_diversity sd ON ru.student_id = sd.student_id CROSS JOIN class_diversity cd ORDER BY ru.student_id, ru.clicks DESC
LIMIT 10000

WITH eng_agg AS (
  SELECT e.student_id, e.enrollment_id,
         SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS total_clicks,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day) AS active_days
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY e.student_id, e.enrollment_id
), class_max AS (
  SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS mc, MAX(active_days) AS ma FROM eng_agg
)
SELECT ea.student_id, ea.total_clicks, ea.active_days,
  (ea.total_clicks / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5 + (ea.active_days / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5 AS engagement_score,
  CASE NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(ea.total_clicks, 0))
    WHEN 1 THEN 'very_low'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'low'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'medium'
    ELSE 'high'
  END AS study_effort_level
FROM eng_agg ea
JOIN class_max cm ON TRUE
WHERE (ea.total_clicks / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5 + (ea.active_days / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5 < 0.15
ORDER BY engagement_score
LIMIT 10000

WITH score_agg AS ( SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY ar.student_id ), eng_agg AS ( SELECT e.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0) AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day) AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY e.student_id ), class_max AS ( SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS mc, MAX(active_days) AS ma FROM eng_agg ), eng_score AS ( SELECT ea.student_id, COALESCE((ea.total_clicks::float / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5, 0) + COALESCE((ea.active_days::float / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5, 0) AS engagement_score FROM eng_agg ea CROSS JOIN class_max cm ) SELECT es.student_id, es.engagement_score, sa.avg_score, e.final_outcome FROM eng_score es JOIN score_agg sa ON es.student_id = sa.student_id JOIN enrollment e ON es.student_id = e.student_id AND e.class_id = $1 ORDER BY es.engagement_score
LIMIT 10000

WITH
score_context AS (
  SELECT CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8
           ELSE 100::float8
         END AS score_scale,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8
           ELSE 40::float8
         END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8
           ELSE 70::float8
         END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
),
score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         ROUND((
           CASE
             WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                    WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                      AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                  ) > 0
               THEN SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
             ELSE AVG(ar.score_normalized)
           END
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS unweighted_avg_score,
         ROUND((
           SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ), 0)
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS weighted_avg_score,
         CASE
           WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN 'weighted_by_assessment_weight'
           ELSE 'unweighted_average_fallback'
         END AS score_strategy,
         ROUND(AVG((ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold)::int)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS pass_rate,
         COUNT(*)::int AS assessment_count,
         sc.score_scale,
         sc.pass_threshold,
         sc.target_threshold,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)::float8 AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  CROSS JOIN score_context sc
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id, sc.score_scale, sc.pass_threshold, sc.target_threshold
),
punctuality AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         CASE
           WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0
                  / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
           ELSE 1.0
         END AS punctuality_rate
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
eng_agg AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days,
         (COUNT(eng.engagement_id) > 0) AS has_engagement_data
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY e.student_id
),
class_max AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_clicks), 0) AS mc,
         NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0) AS ma
  FROM eng_agg
),
eng_score AS (
  SELECT ea.student_id,
         ea.has_engagement_data,
         CASE
           WHEN ea.has_engagement_data
             THEN COALESCE(ea.total_clicks / cm.mc, 0) * 0.5
                  + COALESCE(ea.active_days / cm.ma, 0) * 0.5
           ELSE NULL
         END AS engagement_score
  FROM eng_agg ea
  CROSS JOIN class_max cm
),
risk_flags AS (
  SELECT sa.student_id,
         e.enrollment_id,
         sa.avg_score,
         sa.unweighted_avg_score,
         sa.weighted_avg_score,
         sa.score_strategy,
         sa.pass_rate,
         sa.assessment_count,
         sa.score_scale,
         sa.pass_threshold,
         sa.target_threshold,
         sa.perf_trend,
         COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) AS engagement_score,
         COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false) AS engagement_score_available,
         COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1)::float8 AS punctuality_rate,
         COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) AS previous_attempt_count,
         e.final_outcome,
         (sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold) AS flag_low_score,
         (COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0) AS flag_repeated,
         (COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false)
           AND COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 1) < 0.15) AS flag_low_engagement,
         (COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7) AS flag_low_punctuality,
         (sa.perf_trend < 0) AS flag_neg_trend,
         ((CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false)
                    AND COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 1) < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS sum_flags
  FROM score_agg sa
  JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id
                   AND e.class_id = $1
  LEFT JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id
  LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id
)
SELECT rf.student_id,
       rf.enrollment_id,
       rf.avg_score,
       rf.score_strategy,
       rf.score_scale,
       rf.pass_threshold,
       rf.target_threshold,
       rf.engagement_score,
       rf.engagement_score_available,
       rf.punctuality_rate,
       rf.previous_attempt_count,
       rf.sum_flags AS at_risk_score,
       CASE WHEN rf.sum_flags >= 3 THEN 'high' WHEN rf.sum_flags = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label,
       ARRAY_REMOVE(ARRAY[
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_score THEN 'low_score: avg_score ' || rf.avg_score || ' < pass_threshold ' || rf.pass_threshold ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_repeated THEN 'repeated_attempt: previous_attempt_count ' || rf.previous_attempt_count ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_engagement THEN 'low_engagement: engagement_score ' || ROUND(rf.engagement_score::numeric, 3) || ' < 0.15' ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_punctuality THEN 'low_punctuality: punctuality_rate ' || ROUND(rf.punctuality_rate::numeric, 3) || ' < 0.7' ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_neg_trend THEN 'negative_trend: performance trend is declining' ELSE NULL END
       ], NULL) AS triggered_flags,
       COALESCE(array_to_string(ARRAY_REMOVE(ARRAY[
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_score THEN 'low_score: avg_score ' || rf.avg_score || ' < pass_threshold ' || rf.pass_threshold ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_repeated THEN 'repeated_attempt: previous_attempt_count ' || rf.previous_attempt_count ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_engagement THEN 'low_engagement: engagement_score ' || ROUND(rf.engagement_score::numeric, 3) || ' < 0.15' ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_punctuality THEN 'low_punctuality: punctuality_rate ' || ROUND(rf.punctuality_rate::numeric, 3) || ' < 0.7' ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_neg_trend THEN 'negative_trend: performance trend is declining' ELSE NULL END
       ], NULL), '; '), 'No active risk flags') AS triggered_flags_summary,
       CASE
         WHEN rf.flag_low_score THEN 'academic_performance'
         WHEN rf.flag_low_engagement THEN 'engagement'
         WHEN rf.flag_low_punctuality THEN 'time_management'
         WHEN rf.flag_neg_trend THEN 'trend_monitoring'
         WHEN rf.flag_repeated THEN 'academic_history'
         ELSE 'monitor'
       END AS primary_support_category,
       CASE
         WHEN rf.flag_low_score THEN 'Prioritise academic support for low average score.'
         WHEN rf.flag_low_engagement THEN 'Contact student and set a weekly engagement routine.'
         WHEN rf.flag_low_punctuality THEN 'Use deadline reminders and submission planning.'
         WHEN rf.flag_neg_trend THEN 'Review recent assessment feedback before the next assessment.'
         WHEN rf.flag_repeated THEN 'Check prior attempt context and create a catch-up plan.'
         ELSE 'Continue monitoring; no immediate intervention flag is active.'
       END AS recommended_admin_action,
       rf.flag_low_score,
       rf.flag_repeated,
       rf.flag_low_engagement,
       rf.flag_low_punctuality,
       rf.flag_neg_trend,
       rf.final_outcome
FROM risk_flags rf
ORDER BY at_risk_score DESC, avg_score ASC
LIMIT 50

SELECT a.assessment_id, a.assessment_name, a.assessment_type, a.week_of_class, COALESCE(a.competency_tag, a.assessment_name, 'Unknown') AS competency_tag, CASE WHEN a.competency_tag IS NOT NULL THEN 'native' WHEN a.assessment_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'proxy' ELSE 'unknown' END AS competency_source, COUNT(*) AS total_submissions, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.score_normalized < 40) AS fail_count, ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.score_normalized < 40) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))::numeric, 1)::float8 AS fail_rate_pct, ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND e.class_id = $1 WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY a.assessment_id, a.assessment_name, a.assessment_type, a.week_of_class, COALESCE(a.competency_tag, a.assessment_name, 'Unknown'), CASE WHEN a.competency_tag IS NOT NULL THEN 'native' WHEN a.assessment_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'proxy' ELSE 'unknown' END ORDER BY fail_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 10000

WITH submission_rows AS ( SELECT COALESCE(e.final_outcome, 'Unknown') AS final_outcome, COALESCE(a.assessment_type, 'Unknown') AS assessment_type, ar.student_id, ar.score_normalized, CASE WHEN ar.submission_day IS NULL OR a.due_day IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ar.submission_day - a.due_day END AS submission_delay_days, CASE WHEN ar.submission_day IS NULL OR a.due_day IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN ar.submission_day > a.due_day THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_late, CASE WHEN ar.submission_day IS NULL OR a.due_day IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN ar.submission_day <= a.due_day THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_on_time FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 ), aggregated AS ( SELECT final_outcome, assessment_type, COUNT(*)::int AS submission_count, COUNT(DISTINCT student_id)::int AS student_count, ROUND(AVG(submission_delay_days) FILTER (WHERE submission_delay_days > 0)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS submission_delay_avg, ROUND(AVG(submission_delay_days)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS net_submission_delay_avg, ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_late = 1) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE submission_delay_days IS NOT NULL), 0))::numeric, 4)::float8 AS late_submission_rate, ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_on_time = 1) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE submission_delay_days IS NOT NULL), 0))::numeric, 4)::float8 AS punctuality_rate, ROUND(AVG(score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score FROM submission_rows GROUP BY final_outcome, assessment_type ) SELECT final_outcome, assessment_type, submission_count, student_count, COALESCE(submission_delay_avg, 0)::float8 AS submission_delay_avg, COALESCE(net_submission_delay_avg, 0)::float8 AS net_submission_delay_avg, COALESCE(late_submission_rate, 0)::float8 AS late_submission_rate, COALESCE(punctuality_rate, 0)::float8 AS punctuality_rate, avg_score, CASE WHEN COALESCE(late_submission_rate, 0) >= 0.5 THEN 'high_lateness' WHEN COALESCE(late_submission_rate, 0) >= 0.25 THEN 'moderate_lateness' ELSE 'low_lateness' END AS submission_risk_level FROM aggregated ORDER BY late_submission_rate DESC, submission_delay_avg DESC, final_outcome, assessment_type
LIMIT 10000

WITH resource_clicks AS (SELECT e.student_id, ev.resource_type, SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS clicks FROM enrollment e JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id=eng.enrollment_id JOIN event ev ON eng.event_id=ev.event_id WHERE e.class_id=$1 AND e.source_dataset='OULAD' GROUP BY e.student_id, ev.resource_type),score_agg AS (SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id=a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id=e.student_id AND a.class_id=e.class_id WHERE e.class_id=$1 GROUP BY ar.student_id)SELECT rc.resource_type, ROUND(AVG(sa.avg_score),2) AS avg_score_by_resource_type, COUNT(DISTINCT rc.student_id) AS student_count FROM resource_clicks rc JOIN score_agg sa ON rc.student_id=sa.student_id GROUP BY rc.resource_type ORDER BY avg_score_by_resource_type DESC
LIMIT 10000
