student_engagement AS ( SELECT ss.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days FROM selected_students ss LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON ss.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id GROUP BY ss.student_id ), class_engagement AS ( SELECT e.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $3 GROUP BY e.student_id ), class_max AS ( SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_clicks), 0) AS mc, NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0) AS ma FROM class_engagement ), eng_score AS ( SELECT se.student_id, (COALESCE(se.total_clicks / cm.mc, 0) * 0.5 + COALESCE(se.active_days / cm.ma, 0) * 0.5)::float8 AS engagement_score FROM student_engagement se CROSS JOIN class_max cm ), punctuality AS ( SELECT ar.student_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS punctuality_rate FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN selected_students ss ON ar.student_id = ss.student_id AND a.class_id = $3 GROUP BY ar.student_id ), risk_flags AS ( SELECT ss.student_id, ss.student_order, ss.enrollment_id, sa.avg_score, sa.perf_trend AS performance_trend, COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0)::float8 AS engagement_score, COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1.0)::float8 AS punctuality_rate, COALESCE(ss.previous_attempt_count, 0) AS previous_attempt_count, ss.final_outcome, CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_low_score, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ss.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_repeated, CASE WHEN COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_low_engagement, CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_low_punctuality, CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_neg_trend FROM selected_students ss LEFT JOIN score_agg sa ON sa.student_id = ss.student_id LEFT JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = ss.student_id LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = ss.student_id ) SELECT rf.student_id, rf.avg_score, rf.performance_trend, rf.punctuality_rate, rf.engagement_score, rf.previous_attempt_count, rf.flag_low_score, rf.flag_repeated, rf.flag_low_engagement, rf.flag_low_punctuality, rf.flag_neg_trend, (rf.flag_low_score + rf.flag_repeated + rf.flag_low_engagement + rf.flag_low_punctuality + rf.flag_neg_trend) AS at_risk_score, CASE WHEN (rf.flag_low_score + rf.flag_repeated + rf.flag_low_engagement + rf.flag_low_punctuality + rf.flag_neg_trend) >= 3 THEN 'high' WHEN (rf.flag_low_score + rf.flag_repeated + rf.flag_low_engagement + rf.flag_low_punctuality + rf.flag_neg_trend) = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label, rf.final_outcome FROM risk_flags rf ORDER BY rf.student_order
LIMIT 10000

WITH selected_students AS ( SELECT s.student_id, s.alcohol_weekday, s.alcohol_weekend, s.go_out_freq, s.health_status, s.free_time, s.lifestyle_risk_score AS composite_lifestyle_risk_score, s.social_balance_score, v.student_order FROM (VALUES ($1, 1), ($2, 2)) AS v(student_id, student_order) JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = v.student_id AND e.class_id = $3 JOIN student s ON s.student_id = e.student_id ) SELECT ss.student_id, dim.lifestyle_dimension, dim.lifestyle_risk_score, ss.alcohol_weekday, ss.alcohol_weekend, ss.go_out_freq, ss.health_status, ss.free_time, ss.composite_lifestyle_risk_score, ss.social_balance_score FROM selected_students ss CROSS JOIN LATERAL ( VALUES ('weekday_alcohol', ss.alcohol_weekday::float8, 1), ('weekend_alcohol', ss.alcohol_weekend::float8, 2), ('go_out_frequency', ss.go_out_freq::float8, 3), ('health_status', ss.health_status::float8, 4), ('free_time', ss.free_time::float8, 5) ) AS dim(lifestyle_dimension, lifestyle_risk_score, metric_order) ORDER BY ss.student_order, dim.metric_order
LIMIT 10000

SELECT e.student_id, s.highest_education, e.previous_attempt_count, s.imd_score_numeric, s.socioeconomic_band, s.disability_flag,  s.disadvantage_score, s.support_score, s.family_stability_score FROM enrollment e JOIN student s ON e.student_id=s.student_id WHERE e.class_id=$1 AND e.student_id IN ($2,$3) ORDER BY e.student_id
LIMIT 10000

WITH total_clicks AS ( SELECT e.student_id, SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS total FROM enrollment e JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND e.student_id IN ($2, $3) GROUP BY e.student_id ), resource_usage AS ( SELECT e.student_id, ev.resource_type, SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS clicks FROM enrollment e JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id JOIN event ev ON eng.event_id = ev.event_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND e.student_id IN ($2, $3) GROUP BY e.student_id, ev.resource_type ), student_diversity AS ( SELECT student_id, COUNT(DISTINCT resource_type) AS used_resource_types FROM resource_usage GROUP BY student_id ), class_diversity AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT resource_type) AS total_resource_types FROM event WHERE class_id = $1 ) SELECT ru.student_id, ru.resource_type, ru.clicks, ru.clicks * 1.0 / NULLIF(tc.total, 0) AS pct_of_total, sd.used_resource_types * 1.0 / NULLIF(cd.total_resource_types, 0) AS vle_diversity_score FROM resource_usage ru JOIN total_clicks tc ON ru.student_id = tc.student_id JOIN student_diversity sd ON ru.student_id = sd.student_id CROSS JOIN class_diversity cd ORDER BY ru.student_id, ru.clicks DESC
LIMIT 10000

WITH eng_agg AS (
  SELECT e.student_id, e.enrollment_id,
         SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS total_clicks,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day) AS active_days
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY e.student_id, e.enrollment_id
), class_max AS (
  SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS mc, MAX(active_days) AS ma FROM eng_agg
)
SELECT ea.student_id, ea.total_clicks, ea.active_days,
  (ea.total_clicks / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5 + (ea.active_days / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5 AS engagement_score,
  CASE NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY COALESCE(ea.total_clicks, 0))
    WHEN 1 THEN 'very_low'
    WHEN 2 THEN 'low'
    WHEN 3 THEN 'medium'
    ELSE 'high'
  END AS study_effort_level
FROM eng_agg ea
JOIN class_max cm ON TRUE
WHERE (ea.total_clicks / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5 + (ea.active_days / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5 < 0.15
ORDER BY engagement_score
LIMIT 10000

WITH score_agg AS ( SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY ar.student_id ), eng_agg AS ( SELECT e.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0) AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day) AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY e.student_id ), class_max AS ( SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS mc, MAX(active_days) AS ma FROM eng_agg ), eng_score AS ( SELECT ea.student_id, COALESCE((ea.total_clicks::float / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5, 0) + COALESCE((ea.active_days::float / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5, 0) AS engagement_score FROM eng_agg ea CROSS JOIN class_max cm ) SELECT es.student_id, es.engagement_score, sa.avg_score, e.final_outcome FROM eng_score es JOIN score_agg sa ON es.student_id = sa.student_id JOIN enrollment e ON es.student_id = e.student_id AND e.class_id = $1 ORDER BY es.engagement_score
LIMIT 10000

WITH
score_context AS (
  SELECT CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 20::float8
           ELSE 100::float8
         END AS score_scale,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 10::float8
           ELSE 40::float8
         END AS pass_threshold,
         CASE
           WHEN MAX(ar.score_normalized) <= 20 THEN 14::float8
           ELSE 70::float8
         END AS target_threshold
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
),
score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         ROUND((
           CASE
             WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                    WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                      AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                  ) > 0
               THEN SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
             ELSE AVG(ar.score_normalized)
           END
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score,
         ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS unweighted_avg_score,
         ROUND((
           SUM(ar.score_normalized * a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ) / NULLIF(SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
             WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
               AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
           ), 0)
         )::numeric, 2)::float8 AS weighted_avg_score,
         CASE
           WHEN SUM(a.weight_pct) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.weight_pct IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.score_normalized IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN 'weighted_by_assessment_weight'
           ELSE 'unweighted_average_fallback'
         END AS score_strategy,
         ROUND(AVG((ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold)::int)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS pass_rate,
         COUNT(*)::int AS assessment_count,
         sc.score_scale,
         sc.pass_threshold,
         sc.target_threshold,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)::float8 AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  CROSS JOIN score_context sc
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id, sc.score_scale, sc.pass_threshold, sc.target_threshold
),
punctuality AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         CASE
           WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (
                  WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                    AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                ) > 0
             THEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0
                  / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (
                      WHERE a.due_day IS NOT NULL
                        AND ar.submission_day IS NOT NULL
                    ), 0)
           ELSE 1.0
         END AS punctuality_rate
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment e ON ar.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id
                   AND a.class_id = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
),
eng_agg AS (
  SELECT e.student_id,
         COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks,
         COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day)::float8 AS active_days,
         (COUNT(eng.engagement_id) > 0) AS has_engagement_data
  FROM enrollment e
  LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY e.student_id
),
class_max AS (
  SELECT NULLIF(MAX(total_clicks), 0) AS mc,
         NULLIF(MAX(active_days), 0) AS ma
  FROM eng_agg
),
eng_score AS (
  SELECT ea.student_id,
         ea.has_engagement_data,
         CASE
           WHEN ea.has_engagement_data
             THEN COALESCE(ea.total_clicks / cm.mc, 0) * 0.5
                  + COALESCE(ea.active_days / cm.ma, 0) * 0.5
           ELSE NULL
         END AS engagement_score
  FROM eng_agg ea
  CROSS JOIN class_max cm
),
risk_flags AS (
  SELECT sa.student_id,
         e.enrollment_id,
         sa.avg_score,
         sa.unweighted_avg_score,
         sa.weighted_avg_score,
         sa.score_strategy,
         sa.pass_rate,
         sa.assessment_count,
         sa.score_scale,
         sa.pass_threshold,
         sa.target_threshold,
         sa.perf_trend,
         COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 0) AS engagement_score,
         COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false) AS engagement_score_available,
         COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1)::float8 AS punctuality_rate,
         COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) AS previous_attempt_count,
         e.final_outcome,
         (sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold) AS flag_low_score,
         (COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0) AS flag_repeated,
         (COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false)
           AND COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 1) < 0.15) AS flag_low_engagement,
         (COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7) AS flag_low_punctuality,
         (sa.perf_trend < 0) AS flag_neg_trend,
         ((CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < sa.pass_threshold THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(e.previous_attempt_count, 0) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(es.has_engagement_data, false)
                    AND COALESCE(es.engagement_score, 1) < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
          + (CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) AS sum_flags
  FROM score_agg sa
  JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id
                   AND e.class_id = $1
  LEFT JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id
  LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id
)
SELECT rf.student_id,
       rf.enrollment_id,
       rf.avg_score,
       rf.score_strategy,
       rf.score_scale,
       rf.pass_threshold,
       rf.target_threshold,
       rf.engagement_score,
       rf.engagement_score_available,
       rf.punctuality_rate,
       rf.previous_attempt_count,
       rf.sum_flags AS at_risk_score,
       CASE WHEN rf.sum_flags >= 3 THEN 'high' WHEN rf.sum_flags = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label,
       ARRAY_REMOVE(ARRAY[
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_score THEN 'low_score: avg_score ' || rf.avg_score || ' < pass_threshold ' || rf.pass_threshold ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_repeated THEN 'repeated_attempt: previous_attempt_count ' || rf.previous_attempt_count ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_engagement THEN 'low_engagement: engagement_score ' || ROUND(rf.engagement_score::numeric, 3) || ' < 0.15' ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_punctuality THEN 'low_punctuality: punctuality_rate ' || ROUND(rf.punctuality_rate::numeric, 3) || ' < 0.7' ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_neg_trend THEN 'negative_trend: performance trend is declining' ELSE NULL END
       ], NULL) AS triggered_flags,
       COALESCE(array_to_string(ARRAY_REMOVE(ARRAY[
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_score THEN 'low_score: avg_score ' || rf.avg_score || ' < pass_threshold ' || rf.pass_threshold ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_repeated THEN 'repeated_attempt: previous_attempt_count ' || rf.previous_attempt_count ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_engagement THEN 'low_engagement: engagement_score ' || ROUND(rf.engagement_score::numeric, 3) || ' < 0.15' ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_low_punctuality THEN 'low_punctuality: punctuality_rate ' || ROUND(rf.punctuality_rate::numeric, 3) || ' < 0.7' ELSE NULL END,
         CASE WHEN rf.flag_neg_trend THEN 'negative_trend: performance trend is declining' ELSE NULL END
       ], NULL), '; '), 'No active risk flags') AS triggered_flags_summary,
       CASE
         WHEN rf.flag_low_score THEN 'academic_performance'
         WHEN rf.flag_low_engagement THEN 'engagement'
         WHEN rf.flag_low_punctuality THEN 'time_management'
         WHEN rf.flag_neg_trend THEN 'trend_monitoring'
         WHEN rf.flag_repeated THEN 'academic_history'
         ELSE 'monitor'
       END AS primary_support_category,
       CASE
         WHEN rf.flag_low_score THEN 'Prioritise academic support for low average score.'
         WHEN rf.flag_low_engagement THEN 'Contact student and set a weekly engagement routine.'
         WHEN rf.flag_low_punctuality THEN 'Use deadline reminders and submission planning.'
         WHEN rf.flag_neg_trend THEN 'Review recent assessment feedback before the next assessment.'
         WHEN rf.flag_repeated THEN 'Check prior attempt context and create a catch-up plan.'
         ELSE 'Continue monitoring; no immediate intervention flag is active.'
       END AS recommended_admin_action,
       rf.flag_low_score,
       rf.flag_repeated,
       rf.flag_low_engagement,
       rf.flag_low_punctuality,
       rf.flag_neg_trend,
       rf.final_outcome
FROM risk_flags rf
ORDER BY at_risk_score DESC, avg_score ASC
LIMIT 50

SELECT a.assessment_id, a.assessment_name, a.assessment_type, a.week_of_class, COALESCE(a.competency_tag, a.assessment_name, 'Unknown') AS competency_tag, CASE WHEN a.competency_tag IS NOT NULL THEN 'native' WHEN a.assessment_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'proxy' ELSE 'unknown' END AS competency_source, COUNT(*) AS total_submissions, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.score_normalized < 40) AS fail_count, ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.score_normalized < 40) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0))::numeric, 1)::float8 AS fail_rate_pct, ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND e.class_id = $1 WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY a.assessment_id, a.assessment_name, a.assessment_type, a.week_of_class, COALESCE(a.competency_tag, a.assessment_name, 'Unknown'), CASE WHEN a.competency_tag IS NOT NULL THEN 'native' WHEN a.assessment_name IS NOT NULL THEN 'proxy' ELSE 'unknown' END ORDER BY fail_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 10000

WITH submission_rows AS ( SELECT COALESCE(e.final_outcome, 'Unknown') AS final_outcome, COALESCE(a.assessment_type, 'Unknown') AS assessment_type, ar.student_id, ar.score_normalized, CASE WHEN ar.submission_day IS NULL OR a.due_day IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE ar.submission_day - a.due_day END AS submission_delay_days, CASE WHEN ar.submission_day IS NULL OR a.due_day IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN ar.submission_day > a.due_day THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_late, CASE WHEN ar.submission_day IS NULL OR a.due_day IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN ar.submission_day <= a.due_day THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_on_time FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 ), aggregated AS ( SELECT final_outcome, assessment_type, COUNT(*)::int AS submission_count, COUNT(DISTINCT student_id)::int AS student_count, ROUND(AVG(submission_delay_days) FILTER (WHERE submission_delay_days > 0)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS submission_delay_avg, ROUND(AVG(submission_delay_days)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS net_submission_delay_avg, ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_late = 1) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE submission_delay_days IS NOT NULL), 0))::numeric, 4)::float8 AS late_submission_rate, ROUND((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_on_time = 1) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE submission_delay_days IS NOT NULL), 0))::numeric, 4)::float8 AS punctuality_rate, ROUND(AVG(score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_score FROM submission_rows GROUP BY final_outcome, assessment_type ) SELECT final_outcome, assessment_type, submission_count, student_count, COALESCE(submission_delay_avg, 0)::float8 AS submission_delay_avg, COALESCE(net_submission_delay_avg, 0)::float8 AS net_submission_delay_avg, COALESCE(late_submission_rate, 0)::float8 AS late_submission_rate, COALESCE(punctuality_rate, 0)::float8 AS punctuality_rate, avg_score, CASE WHEN COALESCE(late_submission_rate, 0) >= 0.5 THEN 'high_lateness' WHEN COALESCE(late_submission_rate, 0) >= 0.25 THEN 'moderate_lateness' ELSE 'low_lateness' END AS submission_risk_level FROM aggregated ORDER BY late_submission_rate DESC, submission_delay_avg DESC, final_outcome, assessment_type
LIMIT 10000

WITH resource_clicks AS (SELECT e.student_id, ev.resource_type, SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS clicks FROM enrollment e JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id=eng.enrollment_id JOIN event ev ON eng.event_id=ev.event_id WHERE e.class_id=$1 AND e.source_dataset='OULAD' GROUP BY e.student_id, ev.resource_type),score_agg AS (SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id=a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id=e.student_id AND a.class_id=e.class_id WHERE e.class_id=$1 GROUP BY ar.student_id)SELECT rc.resource_type, ROUND(AVG(sa.avg_score),2) AS avg_score_by_resource_type, COUNT(DISTINCT rc.student_id) AS student_count FROM resource_clicks rc JOIN score_agg sa ON rc.student_id=sa.student_id GROUP BY rc.resource_type ORDER BY avg_score_by_resource_type DESC
LIMIT 10000

WITH score_agg AS (SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY ar.student_id), feature_base AS (SELECT e.student_id, sa.avg_score, e.registration_lead_time::float8 AS registration_lead_time, COALESCE(SUM(g.engagement_count), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT g.event_day)::float8 AS active_days, s.disadvantage_score::float8 AS disadvantage_score FROM enrollment e JOIN score_agg sa ON sa.student_id = e.student_id JOIN student s ON s.student_id = e.student_id LEFT JOIN engagement g ON g.enrollment_id = e.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND e.source_dataset = 'OULAD' GROUP BY e.student_id, sa.avg_score, e.registration_lead_time, s.disadvantage_score), feature_values AS (SELECT 'registration_lead_time' AS feature_name, avg_score, registration_lead_time AS feature_value FROM feature_base WHERE registration_lead_time IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'total_clicks' AS feature_name, avg_score, total_clicks AS feature_value FROM feature_base WHERE total_clicks IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'active_days' AS feature_name, avg_score, active_days AS feature_value FROM feature_base WHERE active_days IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'disadvantage_score' AS feature_name, avg_score, disadvantage_score AS feature_value FROM feature_base WHERE disadvantage_score IS NOT NULL), correlations AS (SELECT feature_name, ROUND(CORR(avg_score, feature_value)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS correlation_with_avg_score, COUNT(*)::int AS n_samples FROM feature_values GROUP BY feature_name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2) SELECT feature_name, correlation_with_avg_score, n_samples, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ABS(correlation_with_avg_score) DESC NULLS LAST)::int AS abs_correlation_rank FROM correlations ORDER BY abs_correlation_rank, feature_name
LIMIT 10000

WITH score_agg AS ( SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY ar.student_id ), eng_agg AS ( SELECT e.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0) AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day) AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY e.student_id ), class_max AS ( SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS mc, MAX(active_days) AS ma FROM eng_agg ), eng_score AS ( SELECT ea.student_id, COALESCE((ea.total_clicks::float / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5, 0) + COALESCE((ea.active_days::float / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5, 0) AS engagement_score FROM eng_agg ea CROSS JOIN class_max cm ) SELECT COALESCE(s.socioeconomic_band, 'Unknown') AS group_value, COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id) AS student_count, ROUND(AVG(sa.avg_score)::numeric, 2)::float AS avg_score, ROUND(AVG(es.engagement_score)::numeric, 4)::float AS avg_engagement_score, ROUND((AVG(sa.avg_score) - AVG(AVG(sa.avg_score)) OVER ())::numeric, 2)::float AS score_vs_cohort FROM student s JOIN enrollment e ON s.student_id = e.student_id JOIN score_agg sa ON e.student_id = sa.student_id JOIN eng_score es ON e.student_id = es.student_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY COALESCE(s.socioeconomic_band, 'Unknown') ORDER BY avg_score DESC
LIMIT 10000

WITH score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         AVG(ar.score_normalized)                              AS avg_score,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)  AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment  e ON ar.student_id   = e.student_id
                     AND a.class_id     = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
)
SELECT e.student_id, s.socioeconomic_band, s.imd_score_numeric, s.disability_flag, s.highest_education, s.disadvantage_score, sa.avg_score, e.final_outcome FROM student s JOIN enrollment e ON s.student_id=e.student_id JOIN score_agg sa ON e.student_id=sa.student_id WHERE e.class_id=$1 AND e.source_dataset = 'OULAD' ORDER BY s.disadvantage_score DESC
LIMIT 10000

WITH class_enrollments AS ( SELECT enrollment_id, student_id FROM enrollment WHERE class_id = $1 AND source_dataset = 'OULAD' ), weekly_clicks AS ( SELECT ce.student_id, eng.week_number, SUM(eng.engagement_count)::float8 AS weekly_total FROM class_enrollments ce JOIN engagement eng ON ce.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE eng.week_number IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ce.student_id, eng.week_number ), student_consistency AS ( SELECT ce.student_id, COALESCE(STDDEV(wc.weekly_total), 0)::float8 AS weekly_stddev, COALESCE(AVG(wc.weekly_total), 0)::float8 AS weekly_avg, COALESCE(SUM(wc.weekly_total), 0)::float8 AS total_clicks, COUNT(wc.week_number)::int AS active_weeks FROM class_enrollments ce LEFT JOIN weekly_clicks wc ON ce.student_id = wc.student_id GROUP BY ce.student_id ), active_thresholds AS ( SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.33) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY weekly_stddev) AS p33, PERCENTILE_CONT(0.66) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY weekly_stddev) AS p66 FROM student_consistency WHERE total_clicks > 0 ), classified AS ( SELECT sc.student_id, sc.weekly_stddev, sc.weekly_avg, sc.total_clicks, sc.active_weeks, CASE WHEN sc.total_clicks = 0 THEN 'low' WHEN sc.weekly_stddev <= COALESCE(at.p33, sc.weekly_stddev) THEN 'high' WHEN sc.weekly_stddev <= COALESCE(at.p66, sc.weekly_stddev) THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS consistency_level FROM student_consistency sc CROSS JOIN active_thresholds at ) SELECT consistency_level, COUNT(*)::int AS student_count, ROUND((COUNT(*) * 1.0 / NULLIF(SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 0))::numeric, 4)::float8 AS pct_students, ROUND(AVG(weekly_stddev)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_weekly_stddev, ROUND(AVG(weekly_avg)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_weekly_clicks, ROUND(AVG(active_weeks)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS avg_active_weeks FROM classified GROUP BY consistency_level ORDER BY CASE consistency_level WHEN 'high' THEN 1 WHEN 'medium' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END
LIMIT 10000

WITH weekly_totals AS (  SELECT eng.week_number,         SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS week_total_clicks  FROM enrollment e  JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id  WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND e.source_dataset = 'OULAD'  GROUP BY eng.week_number),weekly_avg AS (  SELECT week_number,         week_total_clicks,         AVG(week_total_clicks) OVER ()                                     AS cohort_avg_clicks,         AVG(week_total_clicks) OVER (           ORDER BY week_number           ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING         )                                                                   AS rolling_3wk_avg  FROM weekly_totals)SELECT week_number,       week_total_clicks,       cohort_avg_clicks,       rolling_3wk_avg,       week_total_clicks < rolling_3wk_avg * 0.5                            AS is_drop_week,       (week_total_clicks - rolling_3wk_avg) / NULLIF(rolling_3wk_avg, 0)  AS drop_pct FROM weekly_avg ORDER BY week_number
LIMIT 10000

SELECT s.socioeconomic_band AS group_value, e.final_outcome, COUNT(*) AS student_count,  ROUND(COUNT(*)*100.0/SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(PARTITION BY s.socioeconomic_band),1) AS pct_within_group FROM student s JOIN enrollment e ON s.student_id=e.student_id WHERE e.class_id=$1 GROUP BY s.socioeconomic_band, e.final_outcome ORDER BY s.socioeconomic_band, e.final_outcome
LIMIT 10000

WITH score_agg AS (
  SELECT ar.student_id,
         AVG(ar.score_normalized)                              AS avg_score,
         REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order)  AS perf_trend
  FROM assessment_result ar
  JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id
  JOIN enrollment  e ON ar.student_id   = e.student_id
                     AND a.class_id     = e.class_id
  WHERE e.class_id = $1
  GROUP BY ar.student_id
)
SELECT e.student_id, s.alcohol_weekday, s.alcohol_weekend, s.go_out_freq, s.health_status, s.lifestyle_risk_score, sa.avg_score FROM student s JOIN enrollment e ON s.student_id=e.student_id JOIN score_agg sa ON e.student_id=sa.student_id WHERE e.class_id=$1 AND s.source_dataset='UCI' ORDER BY s.lifestyle_risk_score DESC
LIMIT 10000

WITH weekly AS (SELECT e.student_id, e.final_outcome, eng.week_number, SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS weekly_clicks, AVG(SUM(eng.engagement_count)) OVER(PARTITION BY e.student_id ORDER BY eng.week_number ROWS BETWEEN 3 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS rolling_avg FROM enrollment e JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id=eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id=$1 AND e.source_dataset='OULAD' GROUP BY e.student_id, e.final_outcome, eng.week_number)SELECT week_number, final_outcome, ROUND(AVG(weekly_clicks),2) AS avg_clicks, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM weekly GROUP BY week_number, final_outcome ORDER BY final_outcome, week_number
LIMIT 10000

WITH score_agg AS (SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score, REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order) AS perf_trend FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY ar.student_id), eng_agg AS (SELECT e.student_id, SUM(eng.engagement_count) AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day) AS active_days FROM enrollment e JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY e.student_id), class_max AS (SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS mc, MAX(active_days) AS ma FROM eng_agg), eng_score AS (SELECT ea.student_id, (ea.total_clicks / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5 + (ea.active_days / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5 AS engagement_score FROM eng_agg ea, class_max cm), punctuality AS (SELECT ar.student_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS punctuality_rate FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND e.source_dataset = 'OULAD' GROUP BY ar.student_id), risk_flags AS (SELECT sa.student_id, e.enrollment_id, sa.avg_score, e.final_outcome, CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_low_score, CASE WHEN e.previous_attempt_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_repeated, CASE WHEN es.engagement_score < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_low_engagement, CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_low_punctuality, CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_neg_trend, (CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN e.previous_attempt_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN es.engagement_score < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sum_flags FROM score_agg sa JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id AND e.class_id = $1 LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id) SELECT rf.student_id, s.gender, s.age_group, s.region, rf.avg_score, rf.sum_flags AS at_risk_score, CASE WHEN rf.sum_flags >= 3 THEN 'high' WHEN rf.sum_flags = 2 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'low' END AS at_risk_label, rf.flag_low_score, rf.flag_repeated, rf.flag_low_engagement, rf.flag_low_punctuality, rf.flag_neg_trend, rf.final_outcome FROM risk_flags rf JOIN student s ON rf.student_id = s.student_id ORDER BY at_risk_score DESC, rf.avg_score ASC LIMIT 50

WITH eng_agg AS ( SELECT e.student_id, COALESCE(SUM(eng.engagement_count), 0) AS total_clicks, COUNT(DISTINCT eng.event_day) AS active_days FROM enrollment e LEFT JOIN engagement eng ON e.enrollment_id = eng.enrollment_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY e.student_id ), class_max AS ( SELECT MAX(total_clicks) AS mc, MAX(active_days) AS ma FROM eng_agg ), eng_score AS ( SELECT ea.student_id, COALESCE((ea.total_clicks::float / NULLIF(cm.mc, 0)) * 0.5, 0) + COALESCE((ea.active_days::float / NULLIF(cm.ma, 0)) * 0.5, 0) AS engagement_score FROM eng_agg ea CROSS JOIN class_max cm ), score_agg AS ( SELECT ar.student_id, AVG(ar.score_normalized) AS avg_score, REGR_SLOPE(ar.score_normalized, a.assessment_order) AS perf_trend FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 GROUP BY ar.student_id ), punctuality AS ( SELECT ar.student_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar.submission_day <= a.due_day) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS punctuality_rate FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e ON ar.student_id = e.student_id AND a.class_id = e.class_id WHERE e.class_id = $1 AND e.source_dataset = 'OULAD' GROUP BY ar.student_id ), risk_flags AS ( SELECT sa.student_id, e.enrollment_id, sa.avg_score, e.final_outcome, CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_low_score, CASE WHEN e.previous_attempt_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_repeated, CASE WHEN es.engagement_score < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_low_engagement, CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_low_punctuality, CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS flag_neg_trend, (CASE WHEN sa.avg_score < 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN e.previous_attempt_count > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN es.engagement_score < 0.15 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.punctuality_rate, 1) < 0.7 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN sa.perf_trend < 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sum_flags FROM score_agg sa JOIN eng_score es ON es.student_id = sa.student_id JOIN enrollment e ON e.student_id = sa.student_id AND e.class_id = $1 LEFT JOIN punctuality p ON p.student_id = sa.student_id ) SELECT $1 AS class_id, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE es.engagement_score < 0.15) AS low_engagement_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rf.sum_flags >= 3) AS high_risk_count, (SELECT a2.assessment_name FROM assessment_result ar2 JOIN assessment a2 ON ar2.assessment_id = a2.assessment_id JOIN enrollment e2 ON ar2.student_id = e2.student_id AND a2.class_id = e2.class_id WHERE e2.class_id = $1 GROUP BY a2.assessment_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ar2.score_normalized < 40) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) DESC LIMIT 1) AS hardest_assessment, (SELECT ev.resource_type FROM engagement eng JOIN event ev ON eng.event_id = ev.event_id JOIN enrollment e4 ON eng.enrollment_id = e4.enrollment_id WHERE e4.class_id = $1 GROUP BY ev.resource_type ORDER BY SUM(eng.engagement_count) DESC LIMIT 1) AS best_resource_type, COUNT(DISTINCT e3.student_id) AS total_students FROM eng_score es JOIN risk_flags rf ON rf.student_id = es.student_id JOIN enrollment e3 ON e3.student_id = es.student_id AND e3.class_id = $1

WITH score_context AS (SELECT CASE WHEN COALESCE(MAX(ar.score_normalized), 100) <= 20 THEN 20::float8 ELSE 100::float8 END AS score_scale, CASE WHEN COALESCE(MAX(ar.score_normalized), 100) <= 20 THEN 10::float8 ELSE 40::float8 END AS pass_threshold, CASE WHEN COALESCE(MAX(ar.score_normalized), 100) <= 20 THEN 14::float8 ELSE 70::float8 END AS target_threshold FROM assessment_result ar JOIN assessment a ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id WHERE a.class_id = $1), class_students AS (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id)::int AS class_size FROM enrollment e WHERE e.class_id = $1) SELECT a.assessment_order, a.assessment_name, a.assessment_type, a.week_of_class, COUNT(ar.result_id)::int AS submissions_count, ROUND(AVG(ar.score_normalized)::numeric, 2)::float8 AS class_avg_score, ROUND(AVG((ar.score_normalized >= sc.pass_threshold)::int)::numeric, 4)::float8 AS pass_rate, ROUND((COUNT(ar.result_id) * 1.0 / NULLIF(cs.class_size, 0))::numeric, 4)::float8 AS completion_rate, sc.score_scale, sc.pass_threshold, sc.target_threshold FROM assessment a CROSS JOIN score_context sc CROSS JOIN class_students cs LEFT JOIN assessment_result ar ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id WHERE a.class_id = $1 GROUP BY a.assessment_order, a.assessment_name, a.assessment_type, a.week_of_class, sc.score_scale, sc.pass_threshold, sc.target_threshold, cs.class_size ORDER BY a.assessment_order ASC, a.assessment_name ASC
LIMIT 10000

WITH class_students AS (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.student_id)::int AS class_size FROM enrollment e WHERE e.class_id = $1), assessment_completion AS (SELECT a.assessment_order, a.assessment_name, a.assessment_type, COUNT(ar.result_id)::int AS submissions_count, cs.class_size::int AS expected_students, (cs.class_size - COUNT(ar.result_id))::int AS pending_count, ROUND((COUNT(ar.result_id) * 1.0 / NULLIF(cs.class_size, 0))::numeric, 4)::float8 AS completion_rate FROM assessment a CROSS JOIN class_students cs LEFT JOIN assessment_result ar ON ar.assessment_id = a.assessment_id WHERE a.class_id = $1 GROUP BY a.assessment_order, a.assessment_name, a.assessment_type, cs.class_size) SELECT ac.assessment_order, ac.assessment_name, ac.assessment_type, ac.submissions_count, ac.expected_students, ac.pending_count, ac.completion_rate, ROUND((1 - COALESCE(ac.completion_rate, 0))::numeric, 4)::float8 AS completion_gap, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY ac.completion_rate ASC NULLS LAST, ac.assessment_order ASC) AS completion_rank, CASE WHEN ac.completion_rate IS NULL THEN 'unknown' WHEN ac.completion_rate < 0.5 THEN 'low' WHEN ac.completion_rate < 0.8 THEN 'medium' ELSE 'high' END AS completion_status FROM assessment_completion ac ORDER BY ac.completion_rate ASC NULLS LAST, ac.assessment_order ASC
LIMIT 10000
